sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6188" key="a)mfwle/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφωλένιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὠλένη</etym>) <sense id="n6188.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bracelet,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
